display.purpose: Login heading, 2FA heading. Once per screen maximum.

title.purpose: Modal headings, settings section titles. Container-level identity.

body.purpose: All running text, nav labels, form values, descriptions.

label.purpose: Form labels, column headers, status words. Uppercase, tracked.

mono.purpose: Passwords, codes, usernames, timestamps, metadata. Machine data only.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: List row hover, login card rest. Subtle ground-hugging.

shadows.name: md
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover, modal surfaces. Mid elevation.

shadows.name: lg
shadows.purpose: Login card, modals, confirm dialogs, toast. Deepest shadow — floating panels.

shadows.name: inset
shadows.purpose: Top-edge highlight on login card and modals. Physical-object light catch.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Focused inputs and hovered google button. Brass-tinted glow.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Login shield icon only. 6% opacity brass ambient glow.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Nav hover, icon button hover, badge changes.

motion.name: base
motion.purpose: Row hover, panel transitions, toast opacity.

motion.name: slow
motion.purpose: fadeUp animation — login card entrance, modal entrance, chip appearance.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action button. Brass background, dark text. Used for Save, Add, Generate, Refresh.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.72 0.06 70); border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.2); color: oklch(0.14 0.008 70); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25), 0 1px 1px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.07 70); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.25), 0 1px 1px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.15); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with border. Used for Cancel, Close, Reset.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); color: oklch(0.68 0.006 70); font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.17 0.007 70); color: oklch(0.92 0.004 70); border-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action. Red-tinted background. Used for Empty trash, Delete forever.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 10px; background: oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.08); border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.72 0.14 25); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.15); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input for forms. Used in password modal, job modal, TOTP modal, settings.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 38px; padding: 0 13px; background: oklch(0.19 0.005 70); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); border-radius: 10px; color: oklch(0.92 0.004 70); font-size: 12.5px; outline: none; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.12); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.4 0.004 70); }

components.name: Primary Nav Button (Active)
components.description: Active sidebar navigation item. Brass-tinted background, brass text.
components.css: .ds-nav-btn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 12px; border-radius: 7px; background: oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.08); border: 1px solid transparent; color: oklch(0.72 0.06 70); font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; text-align: left; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-badge { margin-left: auto; font-size: 10px; background: oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.1); color: oklch(0.72 0.06 70); padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.1); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Default surface for stat cards, TOTP cards, settings panels, job table container.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.17 0.007 70); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); border-radius: 14px; padding: 18px; text-align: center; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09); } .ds-card-num { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.72 0.06 70); margin-bottom: 4px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-card-lbl { font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.4 0.004 70); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.07em; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: 30×30px action buttons on list rows. Default, Copy (green), Delete (red).
components.html: <button class="ds-icon-btn" title="Edit"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7"/><path d="M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-icon-btn { width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 7px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.4 0.004 70); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: all 120ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-icon-btn:hover { background: oklch(0.21 0.006 70); color: oklch(0.92 0.004 70); border-color: oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-icon-btn.ds-copy:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.12 145 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.78 0.12 145); border-color: oklch(0.78 0.12 145 / 0.15); } .ds-icon-btn.ds-del:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.72 0.14 25); border-color: oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.15); }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Fixed bottom-center notification. Fades in/out. No motion animation.
components.css: .ds-toast { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); background: oklch(0.17 0.007 70); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.09); color: oklch(0.92 0.004 70); padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 999px; font-size: 12px; z-index: 999; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.3), 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.2); } .ds-toast.ds-toast-show { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Status Chip (Accepted)
components.description: Pill-shaped status indicators in the job tracker.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-size: 10px; padding: 3px 9px; border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; display: inline-block; } .ds-chip.ds-chip-accepted { background: oklch(0.78 0.12 145 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.78 0.12 145); border: 1px solid oklch(0.78 0.12 145 / 0.15); } .ds-chip.ds-chip-wait { background: oklch(0.82 0.1 85 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.82 0.1 85); border: 1px solid oklch(0.82 0.1 85 / 0.15); } .ds-chip.ds-chip-rejected { background: oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.08); color: oklch(0.72 0.14 25); border: 1px solid oklch(0.72 0.14 25 / 0.15); }

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.description: 36×20px toggle for password generator options and settings.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 36px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toggle input { opacity: 0; width: 0; height: 0; } .ds-toggle span { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 20px; background: oklch(0.21 0.006 70); border: 1px solid oklch(1 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: all 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-toggle span::before { content: ''; position: absolute; width: 14px; height: 14px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.4 0.004 70); left: 2px; top: 2px; transition: all 180ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-toggle input:checked + span { background: oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.08); border-color: oklch(0.72 0.06 70 / 0.25); } .ds-toggle input:checked + span::before { transform: translateX(16px); background: oklch(0.72 0.06 70); }

narrative.overview:
Vault feels like opening a personal safe made of dark walnut and aged brass. Every surface is quiet. Every accent is earned. The warm stone palette (hue 70°, lightness 14–21% for surfaces) wraps the user in something that feels considered and permanent — not a disposable SaaS dashboard, but a trusted daily companion.

This system rejects the reflexes that make AI tools look interchangeable: no glassmorphism, no gradient noise, no purple, no big-metric hero sections, no card grids with identical icon+heading+text triplets. Depth comes from tonal layering — five surface steps from --bg (14% lightness) to --bg-raised (21%) — and from the single brass accent that glows only where it matters. Shadows are structural, never decorative. Motion is state-only: elements respond, they don't perform.
keyCharacteristics: Borders at 5% and 9% white opacity — strictly structural
Outfit for human language, JetBrains Mono for machine data

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The brass accent appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point — when it glows, it means something.

rules.name: The Nine-Five Rule
rules.body: Neutral surfaces never reach pure black or pure white. The darkest surface is 14% lightness, not 0%. The brightest text is 92%, not 100%.

rules.name: The Mono Boundary Rule
rules.body: Monospace is used exclusively for data the user did not write in prose: passwords, usernames, emails, codes, timestamps, metadata tags. Never for headings, navigation, or body copy.

rules.name: The Letter-Spacing Axis
rules.body: Display sizes use negative tracking (tighter, more impactful). Labels use positive tracking (wider, more scannable). Body stays at zero.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as response to state (hover → sm, floating → lg). If every card had a shadow at rest, nothing would feel elevated.

rules.name: The Inset Highlight Rule
rules.body: Any surface that uses shadow-lg also gets shadow-in on the same element. The hairline of white at the top edge turns a dark rectangle into something that feels like a physical object.

dos: Do use the brass accent on ≤10% of any screen. Its scarcity creates meaning.
Do use --bg-raised for hover states. The five-step tonal ramp is the primary depth system.
Do keep rows flat at rest. Show border and shadow-sm only on hover or focus.
Do use JetBrains Mono for machine data and Outfit for everything human-written.
Do respect --border (5% white) as the default. Borders define space, never decorate.
Do use shadow-lg + shadow-in together on the same element.
Do use opacity-based fills (8%/12%) for status tints, not opaque backgrounds.
Do animate only state transitions using --t-fast (120ms) or --t-base (180ms).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce to kill all animation.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradients.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Blur is functional (titlebar, toast) never decorative.
Don't use the hero-metric template. No big number + small label + gradient glow.
Don't wrap every element in a container.
Don't use modals when inline would work.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
Don't let the accent leak into neutrals. Gray chroma stays at 0.004–0.008.
